org.eventb.core.tests.EventBTest

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.eventb.core.tests.sc.TestConvergence.MergeTestCase
    test(IConvergenceElement.Convergence absCvg1, IConvergenceElement.Convergence absCvg2, IConvergenceElement.Convergence conCvg, GraphProblem... expectedProblems)
     
    void
    testCvg_00_AllThreeKindsOK()
    All kinds of convergence can be refined by the same kind.
    void
    testCvg_01_NoVariantConvergentSetToOrdinary()
    If there is no variant convergent events are set to ordinary.
    void
    testCvg_02_AllRefinedByOrdinary()
    anticipated events and convergent events can be refined by ordinary events.
    void
    testCvg_03_AllRefinedByAnticipated()
    ordinary events cannot be refined by anticipated events: the concrete is set to ordinary.
    void
    testCvg_04_AllRefinedByConvergent()
    ordinary events cannot be refined by convergent events.
    void
    testCvg_05_mergeFaultySetToOrdinary()
    If in a merge the abstract event have different convergences, a warning is issued and the refining event set to ordinary.
    void
    testCvg_06_InitialisationIsOrdinary()
    The initialisation should be marked ordinary.
    void
    testCvg_07_InitialisationIsNotAnticipated()
    The initialisation must not be marked anticipated.
    void
    testCvg_08_InitialisationIsNotConvergent()
    The initialisation must not be marked convergent.
    void
    testCvg_09_refinedByConvergentNoVariantNeeded()
    If a convergent event is refined by a convergent there is no need for a variant in the refined machine what concerns the convergent event.
    void
    testCvg_10_convergentEventNoVariant()
    If a convergent event is refined by a convergent there is no need for a variant in the refined machine what concerns the convergent event.
    void
    testCvg_11_convergentMerge()
    If a convergent event is refined by a convergent event there is no need for a variant in the refined machine that concerns the convergent event.

      Exception

    • testCvg_04_AllRefinedByConvergent

      public void testCvg_04_AllRefinedByConvergent() throws Exception
      ordinary events cannot be refined by convergent events. In that case the concrete event is set to ordinary.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testCvg_05_mergeFaultySetToOrdinary

      public void testCvg_05_mergeFaultySetToOrdinary() throws Exception
      If in a merge the abstract event have different convergences, a warning is issued and the refining event set to ordinary.
      Throws:
      Exception

      public void testCvg_09_refinedByConvergentNoVariantNeeded() throws Exception
      If a convergent event is refined by a convergent there is no need for a variant in the refined machine what concerns the convergent event.
      Throws:
      Exception
